vibe: National Geographic editorial meets boutique farm-to-table. Rooted in Tamil Nadu heritage.

headings.styles: tracking-tight, leading-none for large headings, leading-tight for subheadings. Exudes heritage and editorial elegance.

body.styles: leading-relaxed, tracking-normal. Highly readable and modern.

labels.styles: uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-xs. Used for tags, animal types, and small CTAs.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous white space, editorial multi-column layouts, large full-bleed imagery.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Use asymmetrical bento-style grids for categories and 12-column editorial grids for content. Ensure padding inside bordered containers.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align text predominantly for readability; center-align only for short hero statements or quotes.

components.buttons: Slightly rounded (rounded-lg or rounded-full). Primary CTA: bg-[#1f4d2b] text-white hover:bg-[#16381f]. Secondary CTA: bg-[#f4c20d] text-[#2D2D2A] hover:bg-[#d9ac0b]. Add gentle hover lift (-translate-y-1).
components.cards: Flat surfaces (bg-white) with delicate 1px borders (border-[#EAE7DD]), no heavy drop shadows. Image at the top should have no padding, text below should have p-6 or p-8.
components.navigation: Sticky header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F8F6]/80) and a subtle bottom border. Include Logo, Links, and a prominent 'Contact Us' button.
components.footer: High contrast dark footer (bg-[#1f4d2b] text-[#F9F8F6]). Massive typography for the CTA (e.g., 'Let\'s Talk'). Include map, social links, and contact info.

animations.scroll: Implement Lenis for buttery smooth scrolling.
animations.reveal: Use Framer Motion for staggered fade-up on scroll for text blocks and cards.
animations.parallax: Apply subtle parallax effects to full-bleed background images.
animations.interactions: Image zoom inside containers on hover (overflow-hidden wrapper, scale-105 on hover, transition-transform duration-500).

pages.name: Home
sections: Hero: Full-bleed cinematic image of the farm with a dark gradient overlay for text readability. Massive serif headline. Dual logos visible in nav or hero.
About/Story: Editorial layout, 2 columns. Text on left, sticky image on right.
Categories: Bento grid showcasing animal categories (Dogs, Cows, Goats, Poultry).
Lead Gen: A massive inline CTA section and a floating WhatsApp button.

pages.name: Category Page
sections: Hero: Category-specific banner with deep green background and elegant typography.
Grid: Minimalist cards for each animal showing image, name, Tamil name, and pricing badge if applicable.

pages.name: Animal Detail Page
sections: Layout: 50/50 split. Left side sticky details (Name, Tamil name, Price, Description, WhatsApp CTA), right side scrolling gallery of images.

logos.description: Dual logo for KSK Farm & Kannialazhann. Contains Kannialazhann oval logo (left) + KSK Farm shield logo (right).

hero_backgrounds.description: Cinematic Tamil Nadu farm landscape with mountain for Home page hero background.

textures.description: Subtle natural texture for off-white backgrounds if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React Router (react-router-dom) for navigating between Home, Categories, and Animal Details pages.
Implement Lenis smooth scrolling in the main app layout.
Use Framer Motion heavily for scroll reveals, hover lifts, and page transitions.
Create a static 'data.js' file exporting the animal lists to act as the database.
All images must use the exact URLs provided in the media section (e.g., '/animals/Chippiparai Dog.jpg'). Handle spaces correctly in the src attribute.
No placeholder images (like via.placeholder.com) are allowed. If an image is missing, reuse an appropriate animal image or the hero background.
Floating WhatsApp CTA should be visible on all pages, linking to `https://wa.me/917305644912`.
Include the Google Maps embed for 'KSK FARMS' in the Footer or Contact section.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements for testing (e.g., data-testid='whatsapp-cta').
For the UI, avoid standard Shadcn card component looks. Use raw HTML/Tailwind to build flat editorial style blocks, big typography, and full-width images.
Include Tamil names alongside English names as requested by the user.
